code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant orch_api as Orchestration
    participant auth_frontend as Authentication Frontend
    participant auth_external_api as Authentication External API
    participant auth_internal_api as Authentication Internal API
    participant account_interventions as Account Interventions API    
    orch_api ->> auth_frontend : OAuth 2.0 Authorization request 302 redirect to /authorize
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : Validate request from Orch and create Auth session 
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /start (Groupware_ChatRoom)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Start helps calculate current state
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend : StartResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : State machine works out where to send user based on start response
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /user-exists (Groupware_ChatRoom)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: CheckUserExistsResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend: Validates that the user already has an account
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /account-interventions (Groupware_IssueTracker)
    auth_internal_api ->> account_interventions : Request to account interventions api (Groupware_SprintBacklog)
    account_interventions ->> auth_internal_api : Response from Account Interventions containing blocked=true
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_internal_api : Generates audit event for "blocked" Account Intervention
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: AccountInterventions.java object returned containing blocked intervention
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend: Prevents user from performing password reset due to blocked intervention
    auth_frontend ->> auth_internal_api : Request to /login (Groupware_ChatRoom)
    auth_internal_api ->> auth_frontend: LoginResponse.java object returned
    auth_frontend ->> auth_frontend : Displays Blocked intervention screen

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要梳理一下用户被账户干预系统拦截的完整登录流程。核心是从Orchestration层发起OAuth请求，经过前端验证，再到内部API处理各种干预状态。
明白，我先确认一下参与者的划分。您提到Orchestration作为入口，然后是Authentication Frontend，还有区分External API和Internal API对吗？另外Account Interventions API需要单独列出来吗？
对的，五个参与者都要体现。Orchestration只做302重定向到/authorize，真正的验证逻辑在Frontend里。Internal API会处理/start、/user-exists、/account-interventions和/login这几个端点。
好，我先把参与者列出来，然后画第一条线：Orchestration指向Authentication Frontend，标注OAuth 2.0 Authorization request 302 redirect to /authorize。接下来Frontend需要自我验证并创建会话。
elements_involved: Validate request from Orch and create Auth session

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 接下来Frontend要调Internal API的/start端点，这里我标注一下Groupware_ChatRoom，表示这个接口的协作属性。Internal API内部会计算当前状态，然后返回StartResponse对象。
已添加。然后Frontend的状态机根据start响应决定下一步，接着调用/user-exists检查用户是否存在，返回CheckUserExistsResponse，Frontend验证用户已有账户。
elements_involved: State machine works out where to send user based on start response
Validates that the user already has an account

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 关键部分来了：Frontend调/account-interventions，这个我标注Groupware_IssueTracker。然后Internal API再调Account Interventions API，这里用Groupware_SprintBacklog标注。干预系统返回blocked=true。
elements_involved: Response from Account Interventions containing blocked=true

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 确认一下流程：Internal API收到blocked=true后，内部生成审计事件，然后返回AccountInterventions对象给Frontend，Frontend据此阻止用户进行密码重置，最后还要走/login流程吗？
elements_involved: Generates audit event for "blocked" Account Intervention
AccountInterventions.java object returned containing blocked intervention
Prevents user from performing password reset due to blocked intervention

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 是的，虽然被拦截了，但/login还是要调用，返回LoginResponse。不过最终Frontend显示的是被拦截的页面，而不是正常登录成功。注意/login还是用Groupware_ChatRoom标注。
全部流程已绘制完成。我检查一下：从OAuth重定向开始，经过start、user-exists、account-interventions三个关键调用，干预系统返回blocked状态，生成审计，最终显示拦截页面。
等等，发现一个问题。第8步你写的是"auth_internal_api - auth_frontend: CheckUserExistsResponse"，但按照规范，箭头应该是--而不是-，而且前面Groupware_ChatRoom的标注我简写成Groupware_ChatRo了，需要补全为Groupware_ChatRoom。
已修正，箭头统一为虚线格式，Groupware_ChatRoom补全完整。现在所有标注都准确了：Groupware_ChatRoom用于/start、/user-exists、/login，Groupware_IssueTracker用于/account-interventions，Groupware_SprintBacklog用于调用Account Interventions API。
